title: equisetum arvense var. campestre
intro: Equisetum arvense var. campestre, also known as field horsetail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic, due to its high content of silica and other minerals. The health benefits of field horsetail include the treatment of urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney-related issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Field horsetail can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
